en: Would you just stay with me stay with you what for look at us. We're already fight. Well. That's what we do
ja: 何のために?見てよ。もう喧嘩してる。
zhTW: 跟你在一起？為了什麼？看看我們。我們已經在吵了。
vi: O voi ban? De lam gi? Nhin chung ta. Da dang cai nhau roi.

en: we fight You tell me when I'm being an arrogant son-of-a-bitch, and I tell you when you're being a pain in the ass
ja: 君がうざい時は僕が言う。
zhTW: 我告訴你什麼時候你很煩人，
vi: va toi noi cho ban khi nao ban kho chiu,

en: Which you are 99% of the time I'm not afraid to hurt your feelings
ja: 君の気持ちを傷つけるのを恐れない。
vi: Toi khong so lam ton thuong ban.

en: They have like a two-second rebound rate, and you're back doing the next pain in the ass thing
ja: また次のうざいことをする。
zhTW: 然後你又開始做下一件煩人的事。
vi: roi ban lai lam chuyen kho chiu tiep.

en: So what so it's not gonna be easy. It's gonna be really hard
ko: 그러니까 쉽지 않을 거야. 정말 힘들 거야.
ja: 簡単じゃない。すごく大変だ。
zhTW: 所以這不會容易。會非常辛苦。
vi: Nen se khong de dau. Se rat kho khan.

en: And we're gonna have to work at this every day, but I want to do that because I want you
ja: 毎日努力しなきゃいけない。
vi: Va chung ta phai co gang moi ngay,

en: I want all of you forever you and me every day. Will you do something for me?
ko: 너와 나, 매일 영원히 함께하고 싶어.
ja: 全部の君が欲しい。永遠に。毎日。
zhTW: 我要你的全部，永遠，你和我，每一天。
vi: Toi muon tat ca cua ban, mai mai, ban va toi, moi ngay.

en: Please you just picture your life for me
ja: お願い。自分の人生を想像して。
zhTW: 拜託？你就想像一下你的未來。
vi: Lam on? Ban hay hinh dung cuoc doi ban.

en: 30 years from now 40 years from now what's it look like if it's with that guy go
vi: Ba muoi nam nua, bon muoi nam nua, no nhu the nao?

en: Go I lost you once I think I could do it again if I thought it's what you really wanted
ko: 난 한 번 너를 잃었어. 다시 할 수 있을 것 같아.
ja: 一度君を失った。またできる。
zhTW: 我已經失去過你一次。我想我可以再承受一次。
vi: Toi da mat ban mot lan. Toi nghi toi co the chiu duoc lan nua.

en: But don't you take the easy way out what easy way there is no easy way no matter what I do somebody gets hurt
ja: 何をしても楽な道はない。
zhTW: 沒有捷徑，不管我怎麼做。
vi: Khong co con duong nao de ca, du toi lam gi.
